name: Map Chunk Bulk
desc: Sends multiple chunks at once. Used for initial world load and large area updates.

fields.name: chunks
fields.desc: Array of chunk data with X/Z/bitmask/compressed data

encoding: X, Z, bitmask, dataSize, compressed data
notes: S26 is the bulk version of S21 — sends many chunks in a single packet. Used on world join and loading large areas. XRay modules also cancel S26 alongside S21 to prevent chunk updates.

implementation.overview: S26 is the bulk chunk send — multiple chunks in one packet. Used for initial world load. XRay modules cancel S26 along with S21 to prevent world updates (keeping ores visible). No module specifically targets S26 beyond the same XRay cancellation as S21.

modules.name: XRay (cancel S26 + S21)
modules.purpose: Cancel both S21 and S26 to prevent all chunk updates.
